name: My occupational illness claim was denied for lack of documentation, can I reopen?
description: Yes, new evidence; act within 20 days[2].

mainEntity.name: My occupational illness claim was denied for lack of documentation, can I reopen?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, new evidence; act within 20 days[2].
acceptedAnswer.description:
Yes, with new evidence within time limits.

Utah allows motions to reconsider[2].

- Submit missing docs.
- Appeal deadlines strict.
- Stronger proof needed.

Lawyer reopens effectively.
